property.name: java.library.path
property.value: D:\Android_Studio\jbr\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Users\wjmlong\.codex\tmp\arg0\codex-arg01y2Iq6;C:\Users\wjmlong\.cache\codex-runtimes\codex-primary-runtime\dependencies\bin\override;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Intel\Shared Libraries\redist\intel64\compiler;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA NvDLISR;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NetSarang\Xftp 8\;D:\微信web开发者工具\dll;;C:\Pr;gram Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\Tailscale\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\wjmlong\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\cli-plugins;D:\OpenCode\cli;C:\Users\wjmlong\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Packages\ast-grep.ast-grep_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe;C:\Users\wjmlong\.cache\codex-runtimes\codex-primary-runtime\dependencies\bin\fallback;C:\Users\wjmlong\AppData\Local\OpenAI\Codex\bin\ada252862d154cdd;C:\Program Files\WindowsApps\OpenAI.Codex_26.715.9868.0_x64__2p2nqsd0c76g0\app\resources;.

testcase.name: firstAndReplayReturnOriginalReceiptAndOneLogicalEventSet
testcase.system-out:

testcase.name: operatorReplayIsIdempotentAndRecordsActorAndReason
testcase.system-out:

testcase.name: concurrentDuplicateReturnsOneReceiptAndOneEventSet
testcase.skipped: org.opentest4j.TestAbortedException: case not selected: concurrent_duplicate at com.rehealth.device.TelemetryIngestionIT.requireCase(TelemetryIngestionIT.java:377) at com.rehealth.device.TelemetryIngestionIT.concurrentDuplicateReturnsOneReceiptAndOneEventSet(TelemetryIngestionIT.java:161) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Unknown Source) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(Unknown Source) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(Unknown Source)

testcase.name: ownerScopeAllowsSameBatchIdWithoutCrossOwnerReplay
testcase.system-out:
